description: Internal model understanding: attention heads, residual stream, superposition, feature circuits, sparse autoencoders, probing, activation patching, and KV cache geometry
source: Anthropic mech interp publications (Elhage, Olsson, Conerly, Bricken et al.), TransformerLens, Lyra/Coalition KV-cache geometry findings
